style: Obsidian relic destination row bitmap texture. Dark gunmetal, blackened silver bevel, smoky center, no Diablo-like waypoint strip. No SVG.

ontology.clause: ONTOLOGY ACTIVE: rift ledger row must keep destination labels readable while matching Black Contract obsidian relic materials.

prompt: Thin horizontal premium dark fantasy UI row texture for an ARPG destination list, obsidian relic nameplate, dark gunmetal, blackened silver bevel, faint smoky texture, carved edge highlights, restrained antique silver trim, tiny empty gem sockets integrated into corners, center must be very dark and readable for Korean HTML overlay text. No text, no letters, no numbers, no icons, no arrows, no characters, no watermark, no gothic arch, no brown leather, no Diablo-like stone strip, no bright gold frame. Opaque production bitmap row asset, not a screenshot.
acceptance: Long horizontal row texture suitable under HTML text.
No text, icon, arrow, character, or watermark is embedded.
Visual language matches the rift ledger panel.
